annotations.text: A graphical representation of the grayscale value of six pixels

annotation.text: The horizontal coordinate represents the pixesl and the vertical coordinate represents the grayscale value of that pixel
The grayscale values of the six pixels
The grayscale value of the first pixel is 25
The grayscale value of the second pixel is 34
The grayscale value of the third pixel is 30
The grayscale value of the fourth pixel is 45
The grayscale value of the fifth pixel is 190
The grayscale value of the sixth pixel is 200
